title: TBD Map Height Labels
description: Elevation markers for a terrain (T-152.16): named peaks/hills merged from locations.json plus anonymous DEM-prominence peaks. Post-floor set (unnamed peaks are ≥ PEAK_MIN_VALUE_M). Coordinates: x east, y north, world meters (same frame as manifest worldBounds).

y.description: North meters (Reforger world Z → export Y).

kind.description: Height-marker taxonomy (mirrors Rust HeightLabelKind). Named hills are exported as 'peak'.

name.description: Optional toponym for named peaks/hills (T-152.16). Absent on anonymous DEM peaks. Rendered as '{name} · {value_m} m'.
